title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Care Hospitals

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Care Hospitals
jsonLd.description:
Care Hospitals has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Mysuru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Care Hospitals:
Care Hospitals is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Care Hospitals!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
